title: Low-Key Parks in The City
content: If you're wondering if there are any parks in the City that aren’t packed with a ton of people like Dolores, we've got this list of parks with lower foot traffic that make it easier to keep your distance. With phenomenal views, rare flora and fauna, and considered to be a favorite by locals, Grandview Park has everything you want for a zen experience away from the crowds. Named after a local environmental activist, Dorothy Erskine Park is a super lowkey park with a solid view of The City. Golden Gate Park is great, but if you're in the mood for something more lowkey, McLaren is the spot. Tank Hill’s got a view that’s just as good as the view at Twin Peaks, but with none of the tourists and crowds. It's the perfect park for a view during a pandemic if you ask us.
